programs.title: How Do They Do It? 11
programs.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.

programs.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programs.desc: A team of specialists, using the latest technology, sets out to search for Bigfoot.He wants to find answers to numerous burning questions.The expedition begins in the dense forests of Oregon.

programs.desc: The series tells the stories of places where incidents involving extraterrestrials probably occurred.Chuck Zukowski and his team of specialists explain the mysteries related to UFOs.
